title: Safe Prompt Template Filling
description: Fill a prompt template with variables, raising a clear error if a required variable is missing.
problem: Write fill_template(template, variables) where template contains {placeholders}. Return the filled string. If any placeholder has no matching key in variables, raise KeyError with the missing placeholder's name as the message.
hint: template.format(**variables) already raises KeyError with the missing key as args[0] - but you must catch and re-raise with str(e.args[0]) as the message, or just let it propagate (KeyError's str already shows the key).
